---
title: "07_GO_GSEA_Dotplot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-25"
---

## 0. Libraries and paths

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Install if needed:
# BiocManager::install(c("fgsea", "org.Hs.eg.db", "GO.db", "AnnotationDbi"))
# install.packages("ggplot2", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr", "tibble")

library(fgsea)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(GO.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)

# ── Paths ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
deg_dir  <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/counts/bulk/DEG/DESeq2"
out_dir  <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/Enrichment/GSEA_inputs/Reports/GO_GSEA/M3"
plot_dir <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/plots/Enrichment/Categorization/M3/M3.GO"

dir.create(out_dir,  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Parameters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FDR_CUTOFF  <- 0.05     # Primary threshold — increase to 0.25 if too few terms
N_TOP       <- 50       # Top N terms per ontology per diagnosis to consider
MIN_SIZE    <- 15       # Minimum gene set size
MAX_SIZE    <- 500      # Maximum gene set size
N_PERM      <- 10000    # Permutations — increase for more precise p-values
SEED        <- 42

diagnoses   <- c("ASD_vs_OCD", "ASD_vs_TD", "OCD_vs_TD")
ontologies  <- c("BP", "MF", "CC")

# Explicitly resolve namespace conflicts
select <- dplyr::select
filter <- dplyr::filter
rename <- dplyr::rename
```

---

## 1. Load DESeq2 results and build ranked lists

```{r load_ranks}

load_res <- function(filename) {
  path <- file.path(deg_dir, filename)
  if (!file.exists(path)) { message("Not found: ", filename); return(NULL) }
  read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

res_list <- list(
  ASD_vs_OCD      = load_res("M3.1_Basal_ASD_vs_OCD_results.csv"),
  ASD_vs_TD      = load_res("M3.2_Basal_ASD_vs_TS_results.csv"),
  OCD_vs_TD = load_res("M3.3_Basal_OCD_vs_TS_results.csv")
)

# Build ranked list: stat preferred, log2FoldChange as fallback
# Gene names must be ENTREZ IDs for fgsea with GO gene sets
build_rank <- function(res_df, label) {
  if (is.null(res_df)) return(NULL)

  rank_col <- if ("stat" %in% colnames(res_df) &&
                  !all(is.na(res_df$stat))) "stat" else "log2FoldChange"
  message(label, ": ranking by '", rank_col, "'")

  # Convert SYMBOL → ENTREZ
  symbols <- res_df$gene[!is.na(res_df[[rank_col]]) & !is.na(res_df$gene)]
  vals    <- res_df[[rank_col]][!is.na(res_df[[rank_col]]) & !is.na(res_df$gene)]

  mapped <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys    = symbols,
    columns = "ENTREZID",
    keytype = "SYMBOL"
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
    distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE)

  rank_df <- data.frame(SYMBOL = symbols, value = vals) %>%
    inner_join(mapped, by = "SYMBOL") %>%
    distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    arrange(desc(value))

  ranked <- setNames(rank_df$value, rank_df$ENTREZID)
  message("  ", length(ranked), " genes mapped to ENTREZ")
  ranked
}

ranked_lists <- lapply(names(res_list), function(d) {
  build_rank(res_list[[d]], d)
})
names(ranked_lists) <- diagnoses

```

---

## 2. Build GO gene sets from org.Hs.eg.db

```{r go_genesets}

message("Building GO gene sets from org.Hs.eg.db...")

# Get GO → ENTREZ mapping for all three ontologies
build_go_sets <- function(ontology) {
  message("  Building ", ontology, " gene sets...")

  # Get all GO terms for the ontology
  go2gene <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys    = keys(org.Hs.eg.db, keytype = "ENTREZID"),
    columns = c("GO", "ONTOLOGY"),
    keytype = "ENTREZID"
  ) %>%
    filter(ONTOLOGY == ontology, !is.na(GO)) %>%
    select(GO, ENTREZID) %>%
    distinct()

  # Add GO term descriptions
  go_terms <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    GO.db,
    keys    = unique(go2gene$GO),
    columns = "TERM",
    keytype = "GOID"
  ) %>%
    rename(GO = GOID)

  go2gene <- go2gene %>%
    left_join(go_terms, by = "GO") %>%
    filter(!is.na(TERM))

  # Convert to named list format required by fgsea
  go_list <- split(go2gene$ENTREZID, go2gene$GO)

  # Filter by size
  sizes    <- lengths(go_list)
  go_list  <- go_list[sizes >= MIN_SIZE & sizes <= MAX_SIZE]

  # Keep term name mapping
  term_map <- go2gene %>%
    select(GO, TERM) %>%
    distinct()

  list(gene_sets = go_list, term_map = term_map)
}

go_data <- lapply(ontologies, build_go_sets)
names(go_data) <- ontologies

message("Gene set sizes:")
for (ont in ontologies)
  message("  ", ont, ": ", length(go_data[[ont]]$gene_sets), " terms")

```

---

## 3. Run fgsea for each ontology and diagnosis

```{r run_fgsea}

set.seed(SEED)

run_fgsea_one <- function(ranked, gene_sets, label, ontology) {
  if (is.null(ranked) || length(ranked) == 0) return(NULL)

  message("Running fgsea: ", label, " — ", ontology)

  res <- fgsea(
    pathways  = gene_sets,
    stats     = ranked,
    minSize   = MIN_SIZE,
    maxSize   = MAX_SIZE,
    nPerm     = N_PERM
  )

  res %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    rename(GO = pathway, FDR = padj) %>%
    mutate(
      diagnosis = label,
      ontology  = ontology,
      direction = case_when(
        FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF & NES > 0 ~ "up",
        FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF & NES < 0 ~ "down",
        TRUE                        ~ "ns"
      )
    ) %>%
    left_join(go_data[[ontology]]$term_map, by = "GO") %>%
    arrange(FDR)
}

# Run all combinations
fgsea_results <- list()

for (ont in ontologies) {
  for (diag in diagnoses) {
    key <- paste0(diag, "_", ont)
    fgsea_results[[key]] <- run_fgsea_one(
      ranked_lists[[diag]],
      go_data[[ont]]$gene_sets,
      diag, ont
    )
  }
}

# Combine into one master table
fgsea_all <- bind_rows(fgsea_results) %>%
  select(GO, TERM, ontology, diagnosis, NES, pval, FDR, direction,
         size, leadingEdge)

message("\nTotal results: ", nrow(fgsea_all))
message("Significant (FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF, "):")
print(table(fgsea_all$ontology[fgsea_all$FDR < FDR_CUTOFF],
            fgsea_all$diagnosis[fgsea_all$FDR < FDR_CUTOFF]))

# Save full results
write.csv(
  fgsea_all %>% select(-leadingEdge),
  file.path(out_dir, "GO_fgsea_all_results.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
message("Full results saved.")

```

---

## 4. Select top terms for dotplot

```{r select_terms}

# For each ontology, select top N terms that are significant in
# at least one diagnosis, ranked by max |NES| across diagnoses
select_top_terms <- function(ont, n_top = N_TOP, fdr_cutoff = FDR_CUTOFF) {

  df <- fgsea_all %>%
    filter(ontology == ont)

  # Terms significant in at least one diagnosis
  sig_terms <- df %>%
    filter(FDR <= fdr_cutoff) %>%
    pull(GO) %>%
    unique()

  if (length(sig_terms) == 0) {
    message("No significant terms for ", ont, " at FDR < ", fdr_cutoff,
            " — relaxing to 0.25")
    sig_terms <- df %>%
      filter(FDR <= 0.25) %>%
      pull(GO) %>%
      unique()
  }

  # Rank by max |NES| across diagnoses
  top_terms <- df %>%
    filter(GO %in% sig_terms) %>%
    group_by(GO, TERM) %>%
    summarise(max_abs_NES = max(abs(NES), na.rm = TRUE),
              n_sig       = sum(FDR <= fdr_cutoff, na.rm = TRUE),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(n_sig), desc(max_abs_NES)) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_top) %>%
    pull(GO)

  message(ont, ": ", length(top_terms), " terms selected for dotplot")
  top_terms
}

top_terms <- lapply(ontologies, select_top_terms)
names(top_terms) <- ontologies

```

---

## 5. Dotplot function

```{r dotplot_function}

make_go_dotplot <- function(ont, top_go_ids,
                             title_suffix = "",
                             max_label_length = 55) {

  df_plot <- fgsea_all %>%
    filter(ontology == ont, GO %in% top_go_ids) %>%
    mutate(
      # Truncate long term names
      term_label  = str_trunc(TERM, max_label_length),
      log10FDR    = -log10(FDR + 1e-10),
      # Mark significance
      sig_alpha   = case_when(
        FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF ~ 1.0,
        FDR <= 0.25       ~ 0.5,
        TRUE              ~ 0.2
      ),
      diagnosis   = factor(diagnosis, levels = diagnoses)
    )

  # Order terms: first by direction in TEA, then by NES
  term_order <- df_plot %>%
    filter(diagnosis == "ASD_vs_OCD") %>%
    arrange(NES) %>%
    pull(term_label) %>%
    unique()

  # Add any terms not in TEA
  all_terms <- unique(df_plot$term_label)
  term_order <- c(term_order, setdiff(all_terms, term_order))

  df_plot$term_label <- factor(df_plot$term_label, levels = term_order)

  # Color scale limits — symmetric around 0
  nes_limit <- max(abs(df_plot$NES), na.rm = TRUE)
  nes_limit <- ceiling(nes_limit * 10) / 10

  p <- ggplot(df_plot,
              aes(x     = diagnosis,
                  y     = term_label,
                  color = NES,
                  size  = log10FDR,
                  alpha = sig_alpha)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient2(
      low      = "#47ACFF",
      mid      = "#FFE8D1",
      high     = "#7b3294",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-nes_limit, nes_limit),
      name     = "NES"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      range = c(1.5, 7),
      name  = "-log10(FDR)"
    ) +
    scale_alpha_identity() +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("GO ", ont, " — GSEA results per diagnosis",
                        title_suffix),
      subtitle = paste0("Top ", length(top_go_ids),
                        " terms significant in ≥1 diagnosis  |  ",
                        "FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF,
                        "  |  Faded = borderline (FDR < 0.25)"),
      x = NULL, y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
      axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11,
                                       angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92"),
      legend.position  = "right",
      legend.box       = "vertical"
    )

  p
}

```

---

## 6. Generate and save dotplots

```{r save_dotplots}

for (ont in ontologies) {

  if (length(top_terms[[ont]]) == 0) {
    message("Skipping ", ont, " — no terms to plot")
    next
  }

  p <- make_go_dotplot(ont, top_terms[[ont]])

  # Dynamic height based on number of terms
  n_terms  <- length(top_terms[[ont]])
  fig_h    <- max(6, n_terms * 0.28 + 2.5)
  fig_w    <- 9

  filename <- paste0("GO_", ont, "_dotplot_top", n_terms, ".png")
  ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, filename),
         p, width = fig_w, height = fig_h, dpi = 300)
  message("Saved: ", filename)
}

```

---

## 7. Combined figure — all 3 ontologies stacked

```{r combined_figure}

# Combine all ontologies in one tall figure with facets
df_combined <- fgsea_all %>%
  filter(
    (ontology == "BP" & GO %in% top_terms$BP) |
    (ontology == "MF" & GO %in% top_terms$MF) |
    (ontology == "CC" & GO %in% top_terms$CC)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    term_label = str_trunc(TERM, 55),
    log10FDR   = -log10(FDR + 1e-10),
    sig_alpha  = case_when(
      FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF ~ 1.0,
      FDR <= 0.25       ~ 0.5,
      TRUE              ~ 0.2
    ),
    diagnosis  = factor(diagnosis, levels = diagnoses),
    ontology   = factor(ontology,  levels = ontologies)
  )

# Order terms within each ontology by NES in TEA
term_order_combined <- df_combined %>%
  filter(diagnosis == "ASD_vs_OCD") %>%
  arrange(ontology, NES) %>%
  pull(term_label) %>%
  unique()

all_terms_combined  <- unique(df_combined$term_label)
term_order_combined <- c(term_order_combined,
                          setdiff(all_terms_combined, term_order_combined))
df_combined$term_label <- factor(df_combined$term_label,
                                  levels = term_order_combined)

nes_lim <- ceiling(max(abs(df_combined$NES), na.rm = TRUE) * 10) / 10

p_combined <- ggplot(df_combined,
                     aes(x     = diagnosis,
                         y     = term_label,
                         color = NES,
                         size  = log10FDR,
                         alpha = sig_alpha)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#47ACFF", mid = "#FFE8D1", high = "#7b3294",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-nes_lim, nes_lim),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.5, 6), name = "-log10(FDR)") +
  scale_alpha_identity() +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  facet_grid(ontology ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free") +
  labs(
    title    = "Gene Ontology GSEA — all ontologies per diagnosis",
    subtitle = paste0("FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF,
                      "  |  Faded = borderline  |  ",
                      "Color = NES  |  Size = -log10(FDR)"),
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11,
                                     angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text.y     = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 0, size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95"),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92"),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

n_total  <- length(unique(df_combined$term_label))
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "GO_ALL_ontologies_combined_dotplot.png"),
       p_combined,
       width  = 10,
       height = max(10, n_total * 0.22 + 4),
       dpi    = 300)
message("Combined dotplot saved.")

```


---

## 7b. Dotplots by significance pattern

```{r pattern_dotplots}

# ── Classify each GO term by significance pattern across diagnoses ────────────
term_patterns <- fgsea_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(FDR)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(GO, TERM, ontology) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_sig       = sum(FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_up        = sum(FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF & NES > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_down      = sum(FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF & NES < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    directions  = paste(sort(unique(direction[FDR <= FDR_CUTOFF])),
                        collapse = "+"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    pattern = dplyr::case_when(
      n_sig == 3 & n_up == 3                        ~ "Shared_all_up",
      n_sig == 3 & n_down == 3                      ~ "Shared_all_down",
      n_sig == 3 & n_up > 0 & n_down > 0            ~ "Shared_all_divergent",
      n_sig == 2 & n_up == 2                        ~ "Shared_2_up",
      n_sig == 2 & n_down == 2                      ~ "Shared_2_down",
      n_sig == 2 & n_up > 0 & n_down > 0            ~ "Shared_2_divergent",
      n_sig == 1                                    ~ "Unique_1",
      TRUE                                          ~ "Not_significant"
    )
  )

message("Pattern distribution:")
print(table(term_patterns$pattern, term_patterns$ontology))

# Save pattern table
write.csv(
  term_patterns,
  file.path(out_dir, "GO_term_patterns.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ── Dotplot per pattern ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
make_pattern_dotplot <- function(pattern_label, ont, max_terms = 40,
                                  fdr_cutoff = FDR_CUTOFF) {

  # Get GO IDs for this pattern + ontology
  pattern_ids <- term_patterns %>%
    dplyr::filter(pattern == pattern_label, ontology == ont) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(n_sig), dplyr::desc(
      fgsea_all %>%
        dplyr::filter(GO %in% GO, ontology == ont) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(GO) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(m = max(abs(NES)), .groups="drop") %>%
        dplyr::pull(m) %>%
        mean()
    )) %>%
    dplyr::pull(GO)

  # Rank by max |NES| across diagnoses
  pattern_ids <- fgsea_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(GO %in% pattern_ids, ontology == ont) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(GO) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(max_abs_NES = max(abs(NES), na.rm = TRUE),
                     .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(max_abs_NES)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = max_terms) %>%
    dplyr::pull(GO)

  if (length(pattern_ids) == 0) {
    message("  No terms for pattern: ", pattern_label, " — ", ont)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  df_plot <- fgsea_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(GO %in% pattern_ids, ontology == ont) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      term_label = stringr::str_trunc(TERM, 55),
      log10FDR   = -log10(FDR + 1e-10),
      sig_alpha  = dplyr::case_when(
        FDR <= fdr_cutoff ~ 1.0,
        FDR <= 0.25       ~ 0.5,
        TRUE              ~ 0.15
      ),
      diagnosis  = factor(diagnosis, levels = diagnoses)
    )

  # Order terms by NES in TEA, then TOC
  term_order <- df_plot %>%
    dplyr::filter(diagnosis == "ASD_vs_OCD") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(NES) %>%
    dplyr::pull(term_label) %>%
    unique()
  remaining  <- setdiff(unique(df_plot$term_label), term_order)
  term_order <- c(term_order, remaining)
  df_plot$term_label <- factor(df_plot$term_label, levels = term_order)

  nes_lim <- ceiling(max(abs(df_plot$NES), na.rm = TRUE) * 10) / 10

  # Pattern-specific subtitle
  subtitle_map <- c(
    Shared_all_up       = "Significant & upregulated in all 3 diagnoses",
    Shared_all_down     = "Significant & downregulated in all 3 diagnoses",
    Shared_all_divergent = "Significant in all 3 — but opposite directions",
    Shared_2_up         = "Significant & upregulated in exactly 2 diagnoses",
    Shared_2_down       = "Significant & downregulated in exactly 2 diagnoses",
    Shared_2_divergent  = "Significant in 2 diagnoses — opposite directions",
    Unique_1            = "Significant in exactly 1 diagnosis only"
  )

  p <- ggplot(df_plot,
              aes(x     = diagnosis,
                  y     = term_label,
                  color = NES,
                  size  = log10FDR,
                  alpha = sig_alpha)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient2(
      low      = "#47ACFF",
      mid      = "#FFE8D1",
      high     = "#7b3294",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-nes_lim, nes_lim),
      name     = "NES"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 7), name = "-log10(FDR)") +
    scale_alpha_identity() +
    scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("GO ", ont, " — ", subtitle_map[pattern_label]),
      subtitle = paste0("Top ", length(pattern_ids), " terms  |  ",
                        "FDR < ", fdr_cutoff,
                        "  |  Faded points = borderline (FDR < 0.25)"),
      x = NULL, y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
      axis.text.x      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11,
                                       angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey92"),
      legend.position  = "right"
    )

  p
}

# ── Generate one dotplot per pattern per ontology ────────────────────────────
patterns_to_plot <- c(
  "Shared_all_up", "Shared_all_down", "Shared_all_divergent",
  "Shared_2_up",   "Shared_2_down",   "Shared_2_divergent",
  "Unique_1"
)

for (ont in ontologies) {
  for (pat in patterns_to_plot) {

    n_terms <- term_patterns %>%
      dplyr::filter(pattern == pat, ontology == ont) %>%
      nrow()

    if (n_terms == 0) next

    p <- make_pattern_dotplot(pat, ont, max_terms = 40)
    if (is.null(p)) next

    filename <- paste0("GO_", ont, "_", pat, "_dotplot.png")
    n_plot   <- length(unique(p$data$term_label))
    fig_h    <- max(4, n_plot * 0.28 + 2.5)

    ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, filename),
           p, width = 9, height = fig_h, dpi = 300)
    message("Saved: ", filename)
  }
}

# ── Summary panel: one row per pattern showing term counts ───────────────────
pattern_counts <- term_patterns %>%
  dplyr::filter(pattern != "Not_significant") %>%
  dplyr::count(ontology, pattern) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    pattern = factor(pattern, levels = rev(patterns_to_plot)),
    ontology = factor(ontology, levels = ontologies)
  )

p_summary <- ggplot(pattern_counts,
                    aes(x = n, y = pattern, fill = ontology)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BP" = "#e05c5c",
                                "MF" = "#4e9af1",
                                "CC" = "#2ecc71")) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title    = "GO GSEA — Number of terms per significance pattern",
    subtitle = paste0("FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF),
    x = "Number of GO terms", y = NULL, fill = "Ontology"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "GO_pattern_summary_barplot.png"),
       p_summary, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
message("Pattern summary barplot saved.")

```




---

## 8. Summary

```{r summary}

message("\n=== SUMMARY ===")
message("Significant terms (FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF, "):")
sig_summary <- fgsea_all %>%
  filter(FDR < FDR_CUTOFF) %>%
  group_by(ontology, diagnosis, direction) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(diagnosis, direction),
              values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
print(sig_summary)

message("\nOutput files:")
message("  GO_fgsea_all_results.csv           — full results all terms")
for (ont in ontologies)
  message("  GO_", ont, "_dotplot_top*.png        — individual dotplot")
message("  GO_ALL_ontologies_combined_dotplot.png — combined figure")

message("\nNOTE: If too few terms at FDR < ", FDR_CUTOFF,
        ", increase FDR_CUTOFF to 0.25 in setup chunk.")

```

## 8b. Emapplot — enrichment map per ontology and diagnosis

```{r emapplot}

# BiocManager::install(c("clusterProfiler", "enrichplot")) if needed
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)

# ── Convert fgsea results to gseaResult object (clusterProfiler format) ───────
make_gsea_result <- function(fgsea_df, ont, diag, gene_sets) {

  df <- fgsea_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(ontology == ont, diagnosis == diag, !is.na(FDR)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(FDR)

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Build the gseaResult object manually
  gsea_obj <- new("gseaResult",
    result     = as.data.frame(df %>%
      dplyr::select(
        ID          = GO,
        Description = TERM,
        setSize     = size,
        enrichmentScore = NES,   # fgsea NES ≈ ES
        NES,
        pvalue      = pval,
        p.adjust    = FDR,
        qvalue      = FDR,
        rank        = pval,      # placeholder
        leading_edge = leadingEdge
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        core_enrichment = sapply(leading_edge,
                                  function(x) paste(x, collapse = "/"))
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(-leading_edge)
    ),
    readable   = FALSE,
    geneSets   = gene_sets,
    geneList   = ranked_lists[[diag]],
    keytype    = "ENTREZID",
    organism   = "Homo sapiens",
    setType    = paste0("GO_", ont),
    permScores = matrix(),
    params     = list(pvalueCutoff  = FDR_CUTOFF,
                      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                      minGSSize     = MIN_SIZE,
                      maxGSSize     = MAX_SIZE)
  )

  gsea_obj
}

# ── Generate emapplot for significant terms ───────────────────────────────────
make_emapplot <- function(gsea_obj, diag, ont, fdr_cutoff = FDR_CUTOFF,
                           showCategory = 30) {

  if (is.null(gsea_obj)) return(invisible(NULL))

  # Filter to significant terms
  sig_obj <- gsea_obj
  sig_obj@result <- sig_obj@result %>%
    dplyr::filter(p.adjust <= fdr_cutoff)

  if (nrow(sig_obj@result) < 3) {
    message("  Too few significant terms for emapplot: ",
            diag, " — ", ont, " (n=", nrow(sig_obj@result), ")")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # Calculate pairwise term similarity
  sig_obj <- pairwise_termsim(sig_obj)

  p <- emapplot(
    sig_obj,
    showCategory = min(showCategory, nrow(sig_obj@result)),
    color        = "NES",
    layout       = "nicely",
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient2(
      low      = "#47ACFF",
      mid      = "#FFE8D1",
      high     = "#7b3294",
      midpoint = 0,
      name     = "NES"
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("GO ", ont, " — Enrichment map: ", diag),
      subtitle = paste0("FDR < ", fdr_cutoff,
                        "  |  Nodes = GO terms  |  Edges = shared genes")
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40")
    )

  p
}

# ── Run for all ontologies and diagnoses ──────────────────────────────────────
MIN_TERMS_EMAP <- 10  # minimum terms needed for a meaningful emapplot

for (ont in ontologies) {
  for (diag in diagnoses) {

    # Check how many significant terms exist before attempting
    n_sig <- fgsea_all %>%
      dplyr::filter(ontology == ont, diagnosis == diag,
                    FDR < FDR_CUTOFF) %>%
      nrow()

    if (n_sig < MIN_TERMS_EMAP) {
      message("Skipping emapplot: ", diag, " — ", ont,
              "  (only ", n_sig, " significant terms, need >= ", MIN_TERMS_EMAP, ")")
      next
    }

    message("Emapplot: ", diag, " — ", ont, "  (", n_sig, " terms)")

    gsea_obj <- make_gsea_result(fgsea_all, ont, diag,
                                  go_data[[ont]]$gene_sets)
    p <- make_emapplot(gsea_obj, diag, ont)
    if (is.null(p)) next

    filename <- paste0("GO_", ont, "_", diag, "_emapplot.png")
    ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, filename), p,
           width = 10, height = 9, dpi = 300)
    message("  Saved: ", filename)
  }
}

```
